overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character walking through an industrial district at night. The scene features orange-lit factory buildings, smokestacks, elevated highways with neon lighting, and futuristic vehicles in a hazy urban environment.

complex network of industrial pipes and walkways

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow industrial corridor surrounded by orange-lit factory buildings and smokestacks. The ground is asphalt with sparse vegetation, and a tall transmission tower is visible in the distance against the hazy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial walkway adjacent to elevated neon highway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as an elevated highway with distinctive cyan neon lights appears on the left. The character continues walking past industrial buildings and palm trees along the asphalt path, moving away from the smokestacks toward a more open industrial parking area.

segments.scene_description: Entering an open parking lot, the character approaches a sleek futuristic silver car where a person in red stands nearby. The character walks around the vehicle and continues toward a street corner, passing shipping containers and industrial warehouses.

painted white crosswalk lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Reaching a street corner, the character passes two women standing near a crosswalk beneath traffic lights. The elevated highway is visible again in the distance as the character continues walking along the urban sidewalk past street signs and illuminated billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually expands into a wide, neon-lit urban street. It begins by navigating a narrow path between orange-lit factory buildings and towering smokestacks under a hazy night sky. As the environment opens up, the camera moves past palm trees and toward an elevated highway glowing with cyan neon lights, shifting from the dense industrial zone into a spacious parking area. The scene then flows around a sleek silver futuristic car and a figure in red before passing shipping containers and warehouses toward a street corner. Finally, the camera glides past pedestrians at a crosswalk and under illuminated billboards, with the distant highway framing the transition into the broader city landscape.
